notes: Japanese silicone technology leader with a comprehensive portfolio of silicone film formers, elastomers, and sensory modifiers for personal care. Shin-Etsu Chemical is renowned for the quality and consistency of its silicone ingredients, including dimethicone, phenyl trimethicone, silicone elastomers, and silicone resins. Their products are widely used in premium color cosmetics, long-wear foundations, and luxury skincare for their signature silky, luxurious skin feel.
